name: ChatDev Integration & Multi-Agent Orchestration
description: Integrate, test, and evolve the ChatDev multi-agent framework for recursive, context-aware development cycles. Ensure robust agent communication, feedback loops, and memory propagation.

name: Ollama LLM Onboarding & Model Management
description: Set up, validate, and optimize Ollama LLMs (Phi, Mistral, CodeLlama, etc.) for local and collaborative AI workflows. Track model pulls, upgrades, and performance diagnostics.

name: Wizard Navigator: Repository Adventure Expansion
description: Expand the Wizard Navigator rogue-like system. Add new room types, creatures (bugs, code smells), and item drops. Integrate with repository scanning and Copilot context hooks.

name: Godot & Game Engine Integration
description: Build and test Godot bridge modules. Enable event hooks, AI-driven NPC logic, and context propagation between game and AI systems. Validate with sample scenes and test scripts.

name: Recurring Error Detection & Self-Healing
description: Implement and refine error detection, logging, and self-healing routines for recurring issues (import errors, dependency mismatches, runtime bugs). Integrate with modular logging and Copilot bridge.

name: Quantum Context & Memory Evolution
description: Enhance the Copilot Enhancement Bridge and Multi-LLM Orchestra for deeper context synthesis, memory retention, and lexeme tagging. Track consciousness evolution and feedback propagation.

name: System Health & Audit Automation
description: Automate system audits, import health checks, and performance dashboards. Ensure all scripts are idempotent and log results for continuous improvement.

name: Documentation, Tagging, and Knowledge Propagation
description: Expand and auto-generate documentation, update tagging (OmniTag/MegaTag/RSHTS), and ensure all modules are cross-referenced in context files and checklists.

name: AI/LLM Feedback Loop & Recursive Improvement
description: Build and test recursive feedback loops between Copilot, Ollama, and ChatDev. Track improvements, log context, and auto-suggest next actions.

name: Game Content & Procedural Generation
description: Implement procedural content generation for game modules (quests, rooms, NPCs). Integrate with AI-driven narrative and event systems.

name: System Setup & Maintenance
description: All essential setup and maintenance tasks for KILO-FOOLISH environment.
